maxItems.title: Max Items
maxItems.description: Free users: Limited to 10 items (preview). Paid users: Optional, max 1,000,000.

searchUrl.title: Wellfound search URL
searchUrl.description: Direct Wellfound search URL. Examples: https://wellfound.com/jobs (all jobs), https://wellfound.com/role/software-engineer, https://wellfound.com/location/san-francisco.
searchUrl.sectionDescription: Provide the full Wellfound search URL. Camoufox + residential proxy will handle the DataDome challenge automatically.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: US residential proxy is recommended for reliable DataDome bypass.
